2603.26761.title: Tiny-ViT: A Compact Vision Transformer for Efficient and Explainable Potato Leaf Disease Classification
2603.26761.paper_summary: Early and precise identification of plant diseases, especially in potato crops is important to ensure the health of the crops and ensure the maximum yield . Potato leaf diseases, such as Early Blight and Late Blight, pose significant challenges to farmers, often resulting in yield losses and increased pesticide use. Traditional methods of detection are not only time-consuming, but are also subject to human error, which is why automated and efficient methods are required. The paper introduces a new method of potato leaf disease classification Tiny-ViT model, which is a small and effective Vision Transformer (ViT) developed to be used in resource-limited systems. The model is tested on a dataset of three classes, namely Early Blight, Late Blight, and Healthy leaves, and the preprocessing procedures include resizing, CLAHE, and Gaussian blur to improve the quality of the image. Tiny-ViT model has an impressive test accuracy of 99.85% and a mean CV accuracy of 99.82% which is better than baseline models such as DEIT Small, SWIN Tiny, and MobileViT XS. In addition to this, the model has a Matthews Correlation Coefficient (MCC) of 0.9990 and narrow confidence intervals (CI) of [0.9980, 0.9995], which indicates high reliability and generalization. The training and testing inference time is competitive, and the model exhibits low computational expenses, thereby, making it applicable in real-time applications. Moreover, interpretability of the model is improved with the help of GRAD-CAM, which identifies diseased areas. Altogether, the proposed Tiny-ViT is a solution with a high level of robustness, efficiency, and explainability to the problem of plant disease classification.
2603.26761.paper_summary_zh: 早期且精確地識別植物疾病，特別是在馬鈴薯作物中，對於確保作物的健康和最大產量至關重要。馬鈴薯葉部疾病，如早疫病和晚疫病，對農民構成了重大挑戰，經常導致產量損失和農藥使用增加。傳統的檢測方法不僅耗時，還容易受到人為錯誤的影響，因此需要自動化和高效的方法。本文介紹了一種新的馬鈴薯葉部疾病分類方法——Tiny-ViT模型，這是一種小型且有效的視覺轉換器（ViT），旨在用於資源有限的系統。該模型在三個類別的數據集上進行測試，分別是早疫病、晚疫病和健康葉片，預處理程序包括調整大小、CLAHE和高斯模糊，以改善圖像質量。Tiny-ViT模型的測試準確率達到99.85%，平均交叉驗證準確率為99.82%，優於基準模型如DEIT Small、SWIN Tiny和MobileViT XS。此外，該模型的馬修斯相關係數（MCC）為0.9990，置信區間（CI）為[0.9980, 0.9995]，這表明其高可靠性和泛化能力。訓練和測試推斷時間具有競爭力，且模型顯示出低計算開銷，因此適用於實時應用。此外，通過GRAD-CAM的幫助，模型的可解釋性得到了改善，能夠識別病變區域。總之，所提出的Tiny-ViT是一種具有高穩健性、高效率和可解釋性的植物疾病分類問題的解決方案。
2603.26761.author: Shakil Mia et.al.
2603.26761.authors: Shakil Mia, Umme Habiba, Urmi Akter, SK Rezwana Quadir Raisa, Jeba Maliha, Md. Iqbal Hossain, Md. Shakhauat Hossan Sumon
